overview: Bluemarlin is a Normal-class Beast monster found in Ship Graveyard. 1 grades: Common. Base stats (Common): 140 HP, 0 physical damage, 600 move speed, ActionSpeed 0. ImpactResistance 3, MaxImpactEndurance 4. 0 attacks, 0 combo chains. Sight range 500.

combo_flow.description: This monster does not use combo chains. Each attack is selected independently by the AI.

strategies.title: Very Fast — 600 Move Speed
strategies.description: Base move speed of 600 makes this one of the fastest monsters. Outrunning it is difficult.

strategies.title: Detection Range: 500 units
strategies.description: Sight radius 500 units, loses target at 10000 units, 180° vision angle.

ai_perception.damage_description: Reacts to damage from any direction.
ai_perception.sight_description: Detects targets within 500 units. Loses target at 10000 units.
